subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the earth! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One from the precincts of His Prison. Verily, He draweth you nigh unto God, the All-Possessing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض اسمعوا ندآء المظلوم من شطر السجن انه یقربکم الی الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @proclamation to the people of the world, @law of cause and effect, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
